author: doll-agent
content:
Add std::ops::{Add, Sub, Mul, Neg} impls for all 6 polynomial types (Polynomial, Chebyshev, Legendre, Hermite, HermiteE, Laguerre). Operator forms panic on domain/window mismatch (matching ndarray's shape-mismatch convention); fallible Poly::add/sub/mul methods stay for graceful error handling.

Implementation in new src/ops.rs via impl_poly_ops! macro: 8 impls per type (owned + ref forms × Add/Sub/Mul/Neg) = 48 impls total. Bumps with_same_mapping to pub(crate) in all 6 polynomial files so the macro can use it. 11 tests covering all 6 types + the panic-on-mismatch path.
